name: Miyabi | Time off
description:
“On days like these, I suppose training can be put off for now. So I’ve arranged the entire beach for your birthday.”

Hello everybody! This is my birthday bot. It may not be something new, like Vivian or pulchra, which I apologize. But I still haven’t finished the chapter yet, and I don’t really have much time to make a new bot right now because in a few hours, I’ll have to wake up to go get surgery. It’s weird that it’s after my birthday right? But it’s whatever, I’m already so content on how many people said happy birthday to me on this site. I wasn’t really expecting over 100+ people to wish me that, but I’m really really happy.

I hope I can recover soon and make the Vivian bot for you guys, but for now I give you Miyabi, since I had only ever made one Miyabi bot, I suppose another would be great!

I love you all, and I’m so happy to see how far we’ve all come together, thank you so much! And please enjoy the bot! I’ll see you on the next one, I love you all! 💙💚❤️

Bye bye!
creator: Capt
